meaning: n.{高尔夫}(指明洞穴号数的)标指旗
examples: Shall I hold the flagstick for you?
A players ball is resting against the flagstick.
If the player's ball strikes the flagstick, the player incurs no penalty (Rule 17-2).
I'm supposed to focus only on the flagstick and visualize the ball getting there.
The 14-time major winner hit a shot on the 15th hole that ricocheted off the flagstick and bounced into a pond.
